title: [Origin Realms] Fragment Identifier
description: Helps to easily identify artifact fragments, pottery sherds and junk items
body:
THIS RESOURCEPACK NEEDS [ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker)

Helps to easily and quickly identify artifact fragments, pottery sherds and junk items by giving a single brush to suspicious gravel/sand
- Artifact fragments: green frame
- Legendary Shards: orange frame
- Special items: purple frame
- Pottery sherds: light blue frame
- Junk items: red frame

The following items cannot currently have a frame:
- Excavating I (enchanting book)
- Sniffer Egg
